- 修复云端浏览在多级目录中返回时会直接退出页面的问题
- 新增 SMB 根路径共享枚举，连接服务器后可直接选择共享目录
- 改进云端字幕选择器，支持在系统文件选择器中定位当前云端目录
- 改进自动字幕发现，支持 `.sc.ass`、`.chs.srt` 等带语言后缀的字幕文件

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Fix cloud browsing so back navigation returns to the parent directory instead of leaving the page
- Add SMB share enumeration at the server root so shared folders can be selected directly after connecting
- Improve the cloud subtitle picker so the system file picker can jump to the current cloud directory
- Improve automatic subtitle discovery to support subtitle files with language suffixes such as `.sc.ass` and `.chs.srt`

</details>
